===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Ghetsis PG.png|thumb|250px|Ghetsis in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Ghetsis appeared in ''[[PG15|The King Returns]]''. He was in the [[Giant Chasm]] alongside {{p|Kyurem}}, finishing his plans to freeze Unova. Despite [[N]] and his {{p|Reshiram}}'s attempt to stop them, he managed to {{pkmn|fusion|fuse}} Reshiram and Kyurem into White Kyurem to further his plans. He was then challenged by {{ga|Hilbert}} and his {{p|Zekrom}}.
